zones.name: Clearfell
zones.route: Head to the North to kill the boss. The Mysterious Campsite spawns to the left or right of the starting zone.
zones.notes: Beira is always north/northeast of waypoint. Mud Burrow and the worm boss can be skipped.

objectives.text: Kill Beira of the Rotten Pack
objectives.tip: Boss is always north/northeast of waypoint

objectives.text: Find exit to Grelwood
objectives.tip: Use checkpoint from Beira to return if you find exit first

objectives.text: Find the Mysterious Campsite
objectives.tip: Uncut support gem reward - spawns left or right of starting zone

objectives.text: Mud Burrow Entrance / Waypoint
objectives.tip: Can be skipped - worm boss is not required

zones.name: Mud Burrow
zones.route: This zone is often skipped by speedrunners. Boss is typically found within the area.
zones.notes: Entire zone is optional and can be skipped. Only recommended for first characters.

objectives.text: Find and kill The Devourer
objectives.reward: Uncut Skill Gem (Level 2) (Boss Drop), Uncut Support Gem (Level 1) (Quest Reward)
objectives.tip: Entire zone is optional - speedrunners skip this

zones.name: The Grelwood
zones.route: Follow the diamond pattern to find the four main points of interest. The Red Vale entrance is usually in the same quadrant as the Brambleghast arena.
zones.notes: Find waypoint first (somewhat in center). Enter zones to take their waypoints, then backtrack to Grelwood.

objectives.text: Find waypoint and talk to quest NPC
objectives.tip: Waypoint is somewhat in center of zone

objectives.text: Find exit to Grim Tangle
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Grelwood

objectives.text: Find exit to Red Vale
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Grelwood

objectives.text: Go to Red Vale
objectives.tip: Either via waypoint or checkpoint

objectives.text: Find and kill Brambleghast
objectives.tip: Level 2 uncut skill gem reward

objectives.text: Find the Cauldron in the Witch Hut encounter
objectives.reward: Medium Life and Medium Mana Flask, Uncut Support Gem (Level 1)
objectives.tip: Free medium mana/life flask

objectives.text: The Red Vale Entrance
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, then backtrack to Grelwood

zones.name: The Red Vale
zones.route: Follow a general loop pattern to locate the three Rust Altars for the quest.
zones.notes: Find the three obelisks and get the three quest items (Rust Altars).

objectives.text: Find the three obelisks and get the three quest items
objectives.tip: Follow a loop pattern to locate all three Rust Altars

objectives.text: Return to Grelwood for town visit sequence
objectives.tip: See town visits for detailed steps

objectives.text: Boss: The Rust King
objectives.tip: Found after completing the Rust Altars quest

objectives.text: Weapon Piles (Multiple)
objectives.tip: Located throughout the zone

zones.name: The Grim Tangle
zones.route: Head in the opposite direction of the entrance; this is where the area 'opens up' and usually leads to the exit.
zones.notes: The Rotten Druid boss is optional. Head to Cemetery of the Eternals after entering.

objectives.text: Find exit to Cemetery of the Eternals
objectives.tip: Head opposite direction of entrance where area opens up

objectives.text: Find and kill The Rotten Druid
objectives.tip: Uncut support gem reward

zones.name: Cemetery of the Eternals
zones.route: Hug one wall; one tomb (Mausoleum or Tomb of the Consort) often spawns alongside the same wall as the Boss arena (57%+ of the time).
zones.notes: Clear both tombs before fighting Lachlann. Use checkpoint to teleport to zone beginning, then waypoint back to Cemetery.

objectives.text: Find the Mausoleum, kill the boss inside
objectives.tip: On second boss, use checkpoint to teleport to zone beginning, then waypoint to Cemetery

objectives.text: Find the Tomb, kill the boss inside
objectives.tip: Part of Sorrow Among Stones quest

objectives.text: Talk to Lachlann, open the gate, kill Lachlann
objectives.tip: Main boss after completing both tombs

objectives.text: Enter Hunting Grounds
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

objectives.text: Ancient Ruin Sarcophagus (beside Grieving Epitaph)
objectives.tip: Found beside Grieving Epitaph

zones.name: Mausoleum of the Praetor
zones.route: The Boss arena tends to spawn in the opposite quadrant of your entrance tile. Search for the distinctive ribbed outer edge of the boss tile.
zones.notes: Part of Sorrow Among Stones quest. Kill Draven to progress.

objectives.text: Find and kill Boss: Draven
objectives.reward: Part of Sorrow Among Stones quest
objectives.tip: Required for Sorrow Among Stones quest

objectives.text: Forgotten Riches (Treasure Trove)
objectives.tip: Optional treasure encounter

zones.name: Tomb of the Consort
zones.route: The boss area is typically found along the top of the area.
zones.notes: Part of Sorrow Among Stones quest. Optional: Find Embattled Trove for uncut support gem.

objectives.text: Find and kill Boss: Asinia
objectives.reward: Part of Sorrow Among Stones quest
objectives.tip: Required for Sorrow Among Stones quest

objectives.text: In the Tomb, find the Embattled Trove ambush encounter
objectives.tip: Uncut support gem reward

zones.name: Hunting Grounds
zones.route: Follow the edges and avoid the middle. Points of Interest are located in or close to the corners.
zones.notes: Kill Crowbell first (required for Book of Specialisation). Find exits to Ogham Farmlands and Freythorn, take their waypoints, then backtrack.

objectives.text: Find and kill Crowbell
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points)
objectives.tip: 2 skill points reward - follow edges, POIs in corners

objectives.text: Find exit to Ogham Farmlands
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Hunting Grounds

objectives.text: Find exit to Freythorn
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Hunting Grounds

objectives.text: Go to Freythorn
objectives.tip: Via townportal+waypoint if it isn't the last you found

objectives.text: Find and complete the Ritual site
objectives.tip: Level 4 uncut skill gem

objectives.text: Find and finish the Dryad Encounter
objectives.tip: Uncut support gem

objectives.text: Dryadic Ritual (Tree Creatures)
objectives.tip: Dryad encounter in corners

zones.name: Freythorn
zones.route: Make a loop to find all three Ritual encounters. If you find the boss arena early, watch for 'black magic swirls' which point to any incomplete Rituals.
zones.notes: Do all 4 rituals, kill King in the Mists at the 4th ritual. Then go to Ogham Farmlands.

objectives.text: Do all 4 rituals, kill King in the Mists at the 4th
objectives.reward: Permanent Buff: +30 to Maximum Spirit, Uncut Spirit Gem (Level 4)
objectives.tip: +30 spirit (normal difficulty only) - make a loop to find all rituals

objectives.text: Go to Ogham Farmlands
objectives.tip: Via townportal+waypoint

zones.name: Ogham Farmlands
zones.route: Exit is always on the opposite wall of the entrance. Find Una's Hut behind a hut/cart combo.
zones.notes: Find Una's lute (somewhat in center) for 2 skill points. Then find exit to Ogham Village.

objectives.text: Find Una's lute
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points)
objectives.tip: Somewhat in center of zone - 2 skill points reward

objectives.text: Find exit to Ogham Village
objectives.tip: Exit always on opposite wall of entrance

objectives.text: Find the Crop Circle and kill the rare dog
objectives.tip: Level 4 uncut skill gem

zones.name: Ogham Village
zones.route: Hug the right-hand wall from the entrance and head up (North) toward the boss arena.
zones.notes: Find Smithing tools (only needed on first character per league). Kill Executioner, then go to Manor Ramparts.

objectives.text: Find Smithing tools
objectives.reward: Unlocks Salvage Bench, Artificer's Orb, Blank Lesser Rune
objectives.tip: Only needed on first character per league - unlocks salvaging bench

objectives.text: Find and kill the Executioner
objectives.reward: Uncut Support Gem (Level 1), Uncut Skill Gem (Level 5) (Quest Reward: Save Leitis)
objectives.tip: Save Leitis quest - hug right wall, head north

objectives.text: Go to Manor Ramparts
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

zones.name: The Manor Ramparts
zones.route: Follow the U-shaped pattern.
zones.notes: Find exit to Ogham Manor. Always go opposite direction of waypoint after entering zone. The Gallows is the location from character creation screen.

objectives.text: Find exit to Ogham Manor
objectives.tip: Follow U-shaped pattern - always go opposite direction of waypoint after entering zone

objectives.text: Find the Gallows
objectives.tip: The location from character creation screen - uncut support gem

zones.name: Ogham Manor: First Floor
zones.route: Head Northeast, cross the bridge, proceed North to the boss, then Southeast for the Level 2 entrance.
zones.notes: Find and kill Candlemass. If you find stairs first, go down, take checkpoint, then go back up. You can checkpoint from Candlemass to stairs once you found and killed it.

objectives.text: Find and kill Candlemass
objectives.tip: If you find stairs first, go down, take checkpoint, then go back up

objectives.text: Find and go down stairs twice
objectives.tip: You can checkpoint from Candlemass to stairs once killed

zones.name: Ogham Manor: Second Floor
zones.route: Head in the opposite direction of the entrance, cross the bridge, and continue toward the third floor entrance (Northeast if starting from Southwest).
zones.notes: Pass through to third floor. No bosses or POIs on this floor.

objectives.text: Head to third floor entrance
objectives.tip: Opposite direction of entrance, cross bridge, head Northeast if starting Southwest

zones.name: Ogham Manor: Third Floor
zones.route: Head in the opposite direction from the entrance to find the bridge leading to the boss elevator.
zones.notes: Final boss of Act 1. Find elevator to boss, kill boss, then go back to town.

objectives.text: Find elevator to boss, kill boss, go back to town
objectives.tip: Completes Act 1 - head opposite direction from entrance

objectives.text: Final Boss: Count of Ogham
objectives.tip: Head opposite direction from entrance to find bridge leading to boss elevator

zones.name: Vastiri Outskirts
zones.route: Follow the inside wall corresponding to the direction the town area 'leans' (Z-shape pattern) until you find a narrow canyon leading to the boss.
zones.notes: Find and kill Rathbreaker, then portal back to camp and enter caravan. Speak to everyone and use desert map to go to Mawdun Quarry.

objectives.text: Find and kill Rathbreaker
objectives.reward: Uncut Skill Gem (Level 6) (Quest Reward), Progresses Earning Passage quest
objectives.tip: Follow Z-shape pattern along inside wall to find narrow canyon

objectives.text: Portal back to camp, enter caravan
objectives.tip: Can also go ESC - respawn at checkpoint

zones.name: Mawdun Quarry
zones.route: Follow an S-shape or Z-shape pattern, hugging a wall and following the bridges to the Mawdun Mine entrance.
zones.notes: Find exit to Mawdun Mine. Follow the checkpoints across bridges.

objectives.text: Find exit to Mawdun Mine
objectives.tip: Follow S-shape or Z-shape pattern, hug wall and follow bridges

objectives.text: Faridun War Cache
objectives.tip: Optional treasure cache in the quarry

zones.name: Mawdun Mine
zones.route: The layout is static (diamond shape); spawn at the bottom, move continuously North to find the boss at the top corner.
zones.notes: Static diamond-shaped layout. Kill Rudja, talk to Risu, portal back to town.

objectives.text: Find and kill Rudja
objectives.reward: Uncut Skill Gem, main storyline progression
objectives.tip: Diamond-shaped layout - move North from spawn to find boss at top

objectives.text: Talk to Risu, portal back to town
objectives.tip: Main storyline progression

objectives.text: Munitions Bunker
objectives.tip: Optional area within the mine

zones.name: Traitor's Passage
zones.route: Find the Decree of Imprisonment. Follow the yellow paper seals on the walls to locate Balbala. The opposite direction leads to The Halani Gates.
zones.notes: Follow yellow paper seals on walls to find Balbala. Stairs up leads to Halani Gates. Bell Chest is in a dead end with checkpoint.

objectives.text: Find and kill Balbala, pick up the Djinn Barya quest item
objectives.reward: Djinn Barya (access to Trial of the Sekhema for Ascendancy)
objectives.tip: Follow yellow paper seals - unlocks Trial of the Sekhema for Ascendancy

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Halani Gates
objectives.tip: Stairs up means you are on the right way

objectives.text: Find and loot the Bell Chest
objectives.tip: Two level 6 uncut skill gems (UNCONFIRMED)

zones.name: The Halani Gates
zones.route: Follow the extremely set, narrow layout, moving in the opposite direction from the entrance and crossing the bridges.
zones.notes: Kill Jamanra. Go down stairs and to bottom right of zone, then back to town. Take waypoint to Trial of Sekhemas later.

objectives.text: Find and kill Jamanra the Risen King
objectives.reward: Advances The Trail of Corruption quest
objectives.tip: Keep close to canyon - cross canyon three times

objectives.text: Go down the stairs and to the bottom right of the zone, then back to town
objectives.tip: Narrow linear layout - move opposite direction from entrance

objectives.text: L'Im, the Impaler (Optional)
objectives.tip: Optional boss encounter

zones.name: Keth
zones.route: Run the outside edges to find The Venom Pit (for Kabala) and the exit to The Lost City (often in the opposite corner of the central 'square').
zones.notes: Kill Kabala (somewhat in middle) for 2 skill points. Kill monsters until you find Kabala Clan relic (can drop in Lost City too). Exit always bottom right after big bridge.

objectives.text: Kill Kabala, the Constrictor Queen
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points)
objectives.tip: Somewhat in middle - 2 skill points reward

objectives.text: Kill snake monsters until you find the Kabala Clan relic
objectives.tip: Can also drop in the Lost City

objectives.text: Find exit to the Lost City
objectives.tip: Always bottom right after big bridge - take checkpoint, do the rest if not done

objectives.text: Go to the Lost City
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

objectives.text: Abandoned Prayer
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

zones.name: The Lost City
zones.route: Cross the V-shaped bridge connecting the two large rectangular sections. Continue in the opposite direction from the entrance to locate the exit to Buried Shrines (often in a corner of the second rectangle).
zones.notes: Find exit to Buried Shrines. Two large rectangles connected by V-shaped bridge - exit often in corner of second rectangle.

objectives.text: Find exit and go to the Buried Shrines
objectives.tip: Cross V-shaped bridge, continue opposite direction from entrance

objectives.text: Find the Golden Tomb
objectives.tip: Uncut spirit gem

objectives.text: Find the Ninth Treasure of Keth (big gilded beetle)
objectives.tip: Event name 'The Galleria' on map - Random Jewel

zones.name: Buried Shrines
zones.route: Think of it as two rectangles separated by a pair of bridges. The boss tile (crown shape) is usually at the most Northerly or East-facing point.
zones.notes: Find the Heart of Keth. Boss tile (crown shape) usually at most Northerly or East-facing point. Optional: guarded sarcophagus and elemental offering.

objectives.text: Find the Heart of Keth
objectives.tip: Two rectangles separated by bridges - boss at North or East point

objectives.text: Find and loot the guarded sarcophagus
objectives.tip: Uncut support gem

objectives.text: Find and complete the Elemental Offering Event
objectives.tip: Random resistance ring - Ruby suggested for upcoming boss fight

objectives.text: Boss: Azarian, the Forsaken Son
objectives.tip: Crown-shaped boss tile at most Northerly or East-facing point

zones.name: Mastodon Badlands
zones.route: Hug a wall until you find the exit to The Bone Pits.
zones.notes: Find exit to Bone Pits. Find Lightless passage to unlock Well of Souls. Optional: kill hyenas until you find Sun Clan relic (more likely in Bone Pits).

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Bone Pits
objectives.tip: Hug a wall until you find exit

objectives.text: Find the Lightless passage to unlock the Well of Souls
objectives.tip: Required for progression

objectives.text: Kill hyena enemies until you found the Sun Clan relic
objectives.tip: Don't stress it - more likely to be found in the Bone Pits

objectives.text: Find and loot the Shrine of Bones
objectives.tip: Rare effigy near checkpoint - Uncut support Gem

objectives.text: Fossilised Memorial
objectives.tip: Rare effigy near a checkpoint - Shrine of Bones

zones.name: The Bone Pits
zones.route: The boss room is almost directly in line with the entrance area after passing through the bone arch.
zones.notes: Kill zone boss and loot horn. Kill hyenas until you find Sun Clan relic. Then portal back to town.

objectives.text: Find and kill the zone boss and loot the horn
objectives.tip: Directly in line with entrance after bone arch

objectives.text: Kill hyena enemies until you found the Sun Clan relic
objectives.tip: Required quest item

objectives.text: Portal back to town
objectives.tip: Complete quest turn-ins

objectives.text: Bosses: Iktab, the Deathlord and Ekbab, Ancient Steed
objectives.reward: Uncut Support Gem (Level 1) (Quest Reward for 'A Theft of Ivory')
objectives.tip: Boss room almost directly in line with entrance after passing through bone arch

zones.name: Valley of the Titans
zones.route: Run the outside edge to find the three Ancient Seals required to open the sealed Titan Grotto Entrance (Red Hand icon).
zones.notes: Find and click three ancient seals. Find medallion and place two relics in it (waypoint here). Choose buff (can be changed later).

objectives.text: Find and click the three ancient seals
objectives.tip: Run outside edge to find seals - opens Titan Grotto entrance

objectives.text: Find the medallion and place the two relics in it
objectives.reward: Permanent Buff: +30% increased Charm Charges Gained or 15% increased Mana Recovery from Flasks
objectives.tip: Waypoint is here - choose a buff (can be changed later at any time)

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Titan Grotto
objectives.tip: Red Hand icon when sealed

objectives.text: Go to the Titan Grotto
objectives.tip: Continue to boss

zones.name: The Titan Grotto
zones.route: Travel from the starting area to the opposite side of the 'rectangle' to find the long staircase bridge leading to the boss, Zalmarath.
zones.notes: Kill boss, then go back to town. Quest reward: uncut support gem and 500 gold.

objectives.text: Find and kill the boss, then go back to town
objectives.tip: Opposite side of rectangle - long staircase bridge

objectives.text: Boss: Zalmarath, the Colossus
objectives.tip: Opposite side of rectangle - long staircase bridge leads to boss

objectives.text: Titan's Sword
objectives.tip: Optional treasure in grotto

zones.name: Deshar
zones.route: Check the base of the large buildings for the body of the fallen Dekhara Warrior (Final Letter). Continue travelling opposite the entrance to the furthest edge of the second area for the Path of Mourning exit.
zones.notes: Talk to abandoned rhoa. Find final letter on corpse near big tower (2 skill points on turn in). Find exit to Path of Mourning (enter, take waypoint, backtrack).

objectives.text: Talk to the abandoned rhoa BECAUSE IT'S THE RIGHT THING TO DO YOU MONSTER
objectives.tip: Important moral decision

objectives.text: Find the final letter on a corpse on the ground
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points)
objectives.tip: Near a big tower - 2 skill points on quest turn in

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Path of Mourning
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Deshar

objectives.text: Go the the Path of Mourning
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

objectives.text: The Unremembered (Skeleton)
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

zones.name: Path of Mourning
zones.route: Travel to the opposite side of the area (potential '3-3-3 Pattern').
zones.notes: Find exit to Spires of Deshar. Travel to opposite side of area.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Spires of Deshar
objectives.tip: Travel to opposite side of area - potential 3-3-3 pattern

objectives.text: Hushed Urn
objectives.tip: Optional treasure along the path

zones.name: The Spires of Deshar
zones.route: Tor Gul spawns in a straight line, directly opposite the entrance of the area.
zones.notes: Find Sisters of Garukhan for +10% lightning res. Kill Tor Gul (directly opposite entrance). Portal back to town.

objectives.text: Find the Sisters of Garukhan
objectives.tip: +10% lightning resistance

objectives.text: Find and kill Tor Gul, the Defiler
objectives.tip: Directly opposite entrance in straight line

objectives.text: Portal back to town
objectives.tip: Turn in quests

zones.name: The Dreadnought Vanguard
zones.route: Straightforward, linear layout. Continue in the opposite direction of the entrance until the final boss arena.
zones.notes: Linear layout. Find exit to Dreadnought Vanguard, then find and kill Jamanra. Portal back to town, talk to Hooded One, go to Act 3.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Dreadnought Vanguard, then find and kill Jamanra, the Abomination
objectives.reward: Completes The Trail of Corruption, End of Act 2
objectives.tip: Linear layout - completes Act 2

objectives.text: Portal back to town
objectives.tip: End of Act 2

zones.name: Sandswept Marsh
zones.route: Exit (Ziggurat Encampment) is found on the opposite far wall from the entrance. Run along that wall until found. Azak Campfire is nearby, check both sides.
zones.notes: Exit to Ziggurat Encampment on opposite far wall. Azak Campfire nearby - check both sides. Optional: Rootdredge and Hanging Tree.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Ziggurat Encampment (town)
objectives.tip: Opposite far wall from entrance - run along that wall

objectives.text: Find and kill Rootdredge
objectives.tip: Level 9 uncut skill gem

objectives.text: Find the Orok campsite and loot the rare basket
objectives.tip: 'Azak Campfire' - kill the two rares - lesser jeweller's orb

objectives.text: Find the Hanging Tree and loot the magic corpse
objectives.tip: Random magic ring

zones.name: Jungle Ruins
zones.route: Follow one of the outside walls towards the opposite end (Infested Barrens entrance). Mighty Silverfist usually spawns in the top third of the area.
zones.notes: Find exit to Venom Crypts (near waypoint) - take checkpoint and waypoint, do NOT go through. Kill Mighty Silverfist for 2 skill points. Find exit to Infested Barrens - take checkpoint only.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Venom Crypts (near waypoint)
objectives.tip: Do NOT go through, only take the checkpoint and waypoint

objectives.text: Find and kill the Mighty Silverfist
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points)
objectives.tip: 2 skill points - usually in top third of area

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Infested Barrens
objectives.tip: Do NOT go through, only take the checkpoint

objectives.text: Go to the Infested Barrens
objectives.tip: Continue zone progression

objectives.text: Jungle Grave (Servi quest)
objectives.tip: Servi quest item

objectives.text: Troubled Camp
objectives.tip: Secret vendor - Armour

zones.name: The Venom Crypts
zones.route: Find the Corpse-snake Venom in The Den of the Serpent Priestess.
zones.notes: Find corpse for venom phial, then go back to town. Turn in phial at Servi for permanent buff reward (choice cannot be changed later).

objectives.text: Find the corpse for the venom phial, then go back to town
objectives.reward: Permanent Buff (Choice of +25% Stun Threshold, +30% Elemental Ailment Threshold, or +25% Mana Regeneration Rate); Artificer's Orb
objectives.tip: Located in Den of the Serpent Priestess

zones.name: Infested Barrens
zones.route: Run the outside edge of the area to locate exits to Chimeral Wetlands, Azak Bog, and Matlan Waterways.
zones.notes: Find exits to Chimeral Wetlands, Azak Bog, and Matlan Waterways. Enter each zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Barrens. Then portal back to Jungle Ruins.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Chimeral Wetlands
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Infested Barrens

objectives.text: Find the exit to Azak Bog
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Infested Barrens

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Matlan Waterways
objectives.tip: Waypoint of Barrens itself is here

objectives.text: From whatever you find last, take the waypoint and portal back to Jungle Ruins
objectives.tip: Return to complete Venom Crypts

objectives.text: Troubled Camp
objectives.reward: Sebastian Carroway (Secret Vendor: Weapons), guaranteed Rare Boots
objectives.tip: Secret vendor - Weapons, guaranteed Rare Boots

objectives.text: Larva Hollow (The Brood Queen)
objectives.tip: Optional boss encounter

zones.name: The Azak Bog
zones.route: The boss, Ignagduk, spawns in the top right quadrant of this area (imagined as a square split into four blocks).
zones.notes: Optional: Flameskin ritual (25% fire res and rarity for rest of zone). Find and kill Ignagduk (+30 spirit). Then go to Chimeral Wetlands.

objectives.text: Find and kill Ignagduk
objectives.tip: +30 spirit - top right quadrant

objectives.text: Go back to town and then to Chimeral Wetlands
objectives.tip: Via waypoint

objectives.text: Find the Flameskin ritual and activate all
objectives.reward: Temporary buff to Fire Resistance and Item Rarity
objectives.tip: 25% fire res and rarity for rest of zone - don't search if not found before boss

zones.name: Chimeral Wetlands
zones.route: Hug the outside wall. Xyclucean's arena/Machinarium entrance always faces left/West; Temple of Chaos is always North-facing.
zones.notes: Find temple/trial of chaos (enter, take waypoint, backtrack - do trial later). Kill Chimera boss (follow lefthand border). Enter Jiquani's Machinarium.

objectives.text: Find the temple/trial of chaos
objectives.tip: Enter zone, take waypoint, waypoint back to Wetlands - do trial at any point from now on

objectives.text: Find and kill the Chimera boss
objectives.reward: Chimeral Inscribed Ultimatum (access to Trial of Chaos), Uncut Skill Gem (Level 9)
objectives.tip: Follow lefthand border of zone - unlocks Trial of Chaos

objectives.text: Enter Jiquani's Machinarium
objectives.tip: Behind the Chimera boss

objectives.text: Toxic Bloom (Noxious Behemoth)
objectives.tip: Optional encounter

objectives.text: Ravaged Camp
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

zones.name: Jiquani's Machinarium
zones.route: Find Small Soul Cores (listen for the jingle) to proceed. The exit to Sanctum is usually in a straight line from the start of the second section. Blackjaw spawns on the far left or right.
zones.notes: Find 3 small soul cores (only 2 needed - 3rd door has gold and chest). Kill Blackjaw (+10% fire res). Exit to Sanctum. Checkpoint port to exit.

objectives.text: Find the first small soul core, then open the door
objectives.tip: Either left or right of Alva - listen for jingle

objectives.text: Find two more small soul cores
objectives.tip: 3 total, only 2 needed - 3rd door only some gold and chest

objectives.text: Find the exit towards Jiquani's Sanctum
objectives.tip: Usually straight line from start of second section

objectives.text: Find and kill Blackjaw
objectives.tip: +10% fire res

objectives.text: Checkpoint port to the exit, then go to Jiquani's Sanctum
objectives.tip: Continue progression

objectives.text: Unmarked Treasure Vaults (Requires Soul Core)
objectives.tip: Third door - optional treasure

zones.name: Jiquani's Sanctum
zones.route: Locate a Generator toward the back end of each of the two mirrored sections. Use Medium Soul Cores to power both.
zones.notes: Activate waypoint right after entry. Talk to Alva. Find 2 medium soul cores (random). Activate both generators (left and right back relative to Alva). Wait for soul core to arrive at Alva. Kill Zicoatl, loot large soul core. Go to Infested Barrens waypoint.

objectives.text: Activate the waypoint right after the entry
objectives.tip: Important for backtracking

objectives.text: Talk to Alva
objectives.tip: Quest progression

objectives.text: Find two medium soul cores
objectives.tip: Soul cores completely random in zone

objectives.text: Activate both generators
objectives.tip: Always to left and right back relative to where Alva is standing

objectives.text: Checkpoint back to Alva
objectives.tip: Still need to wait until second soul core arrived at Alva (red lines on ground)

objectives.text: Kill Zicoatl, Warden of the Core and loot the large soul core
objectives.tip: Required for progression

objectives.text: Go back to the Infested Barrens waypoint
objectives.tip: Insert large soul core there

objectives.text: Paquate's Mechanism (Corruption Altar)
objectives.tip: Optional corruption altar

objectives.text: Grand Soul Core Nexus
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

zones.name: The Matlan Waterways
zones.route: Linear area; must pull correct levers to lower water and proceed.
zones.notes: Insert large soul core and go to Matlan Waterways. Activate every lever to navigate through zone, then activate big one at end. Port back to town.

objectives.text: Activate every single lever to navigate through the zone, then activate the big one at the end
objectives.tip: Linear area - must pull correct levers to lower water

objectives.text: Port back to town
objectives.tip: Quest progression

objectives.text: Narag's Hut
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

zones.name: The Drowned City
zones.route: Two large blocks connected by an ambush area. Apex of Filth entrance (right/left) or Molten Vault (corner/side). Layout is the same as Utzaal (Past).
zones.notes: Find exit to Molten Vault (NW) - enter, take waypoint, backtrack (first character only). Find exit to Apex of Filth (NE) - enter, take waypoint, backtrack (first character only). Then enter Apex of Filth or Molten Vault.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Molten Vault
objectives.tip: Almost always to NW - enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack (first character only)

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Apex of Filth
objectives.tip: Almost always to NE - enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack (first character only)

objectives.text: Enter the Molten Vault
objectives.tip: First character only - unlocks reforging bench

objectives.text: Enter the Apex of Filth
objectives.tip: Continue progression

objectives.text: Crawler Ambush
objectives.tip: Ambush encounter between two blocks

objectives.text: Foul Quarters (Multiple)
objectives.tip: Optional treasure rooms

zones.name: The Molten Vault
zones.route: Linear; kills boss quickly (under 4 minutes) before molten gold floods the area.
zones.notes: Linear. Kill boss quickly (under 4 minutes) before molten gold floods. Talk to Oswald back in town (first character only - unlocks reforging bench). Then enter Apex of Filth.

objectives.text: Find and kill the boss, then talk to Oswald back in town
objectives.tip: First character only - unlocks reforging bench

objectives.text: Enter the Apex of Filth
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

objectives.text: Boss: Mektul, the Forgemaster
objectives.reward: Uncut Skill Gem (Level 10), Unlocks Reforging Bench, Artificer's Orb (Quest Reward)
objectives.tip: Linear - kill quickly under 4 minutes before molten gold floods

zones.name: Apex of Filth
zones.route: Spiral pattern curling inwards. Boss is found at the top wall of the large main area.
zones.notes: Huge spiral (clockwise or counterclockwise). Travel full 360° to find boss. Portal back to town after killing Queen of Filth.

objectives.text: Find and kill the Queen of Filth, then portal back to town
objectives.tip: Huge spiral - travel full 360° to find boss at top wall

objectives.text: The Gentle Crone (Secret Vendor)
objectives.reward: Sells higher quality Jewellery and Spellcaster gear
objectives.tip: Secret vendor

objectives.text: The Crone's Cauldron (Requires 3 Fungi)
objectives.tip: Optional treasure - requires 3 fungi

zones.name: Temple of Kopec
zones.route: Triangular layout; find the entrance to the next floor in one of the three corners.
zones.notes: Triangle-shaped zone. Go up stairs twice, then kill Ketzuli. Stay in shade to not take damage. Stairs in corners of triangle.

objectives.text: Go up the stairs twice, then kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun
objectives.tip: Triangular zone - stairs in corners - stay in shade to not take damage

zones.name: Utzaal
zones.route: Same layout as The Drowned City. Boss (Viper Napuatzi) is typically towards the right end of the zone, facing North.
zones.notes: Same layout as Drowned City. Sacrificial heart can randomly drop here (if not found, continue to Aggorat). Kill Viper Napuatzi (towards right end, facing north). Find exit to Aggorat (top right, facing north).

objectives.text: Search and kill Viper Napuatzi
objectives.tip: Towards right end of zone, facing North

objectives.text: Find the exit to Aggorat and enter Aggorat
objectives.tip: Again always to top right end of zone, facing north

objectives.text: The sacrificial heart can randomly drop in this zone
objectives.tip: If you don't find it in Utzaal, just go to next zone - do not farm until it drops

objectives.text: Perculiar Fortunes (Golden Idols)
objectives.reward: Various Idols that can be sold to Oswald for Gold (500-1500 Gold each)
objectives.tip: Optional treasure - sellable for 500-1500 gold each

zones.name: Aggorat
zones.route: Find the large 'worship platform'. The exit to Black Chambers is usually top left; Sacrificial table is usually top right.
zones.notes: Follow voices of Trial of Atziri (sound on beneficial). Exit to Black Chambers after big plaza (top left). Sacrificial table after big plaza (top right). Kill monsters until you find sacrificial heart (if not found yet). Checkpoint port to table, loot dagger, place heart, stab heart (2 skill points). Checkpoint port to Black Chambers.

objectives.text: Follow the voices of the Trial of Atziri (on the big plaza), go through to find the next checkpoint
objectives.tip: Sound on is beneficial in this zone!

objectives.text: Find the exit towards the Black Chambers
objectives.tip: After big plaza, always to top left end of zone

objectives.text: Find the Sacrificial table
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points)
objectives.tip: After big plaza, always to top right end of zone

objectives.text: The sacrificial heart can randomly drop in this zone
objectives.tip: If you haven't found it until now, continue to kill monsters until you find it

objectives.text: Checkpoint port to the sacrificial table, loot the dagger, place the heart, stab the heart
objectives.tip: 2 skill points reward

objectives.text: Checkpoint port to the Black Chambers, enter the Black Chambers
objectives.tip: Final zone of Act 3

objectives.text: Peculiar Fortunes (Golden Idols)
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

zones.name: The Black Chambers
zones.route: Three major sections separated by bridges. Doryani's arena is on the opposite side from the entrance, along the center line.
zones.notes: Final boss of Act 3. Three sections separated by bridges. Doryani's arena on opposite side from entrance along center line (top left or top right depending on entry angle).

objectives.text: Find and defeat Doryani, Royal Thaumaturge
objectives.tip: Three sections separated by bridges - opposite side from entrance

zones.name: Kingsmarch (Town)
zones.route: Talk to Doryani, Alva, Rog, and Makoru (Captain of Aurora May) to unlock the island map.
zones.notes: Speak with Doryani, then Alva. Take the Boat Charter. Speak with Tujen, Ange, Kanu and then with Makoru to select an island to travel to. Whakapanu Island suggested first (for currency exchange/trading ASAP). Arastas suggested after three main islands (Whakapanu, Shrike, Prison). Ngakanu suggested after Arastas.

objectives.text: Speak with Doryani, then Alva and take the Boat Charter
objectives.tip: Begin Act 4 progression

objectives.text: Speak with Tujen, Ange, Kanu and then with Makoru to select an island to travel to
objectives.reward: Grants access to Karui Archipelago map
objectives.tip: Whakapanu Island suggested first - Arastas after three main islands - Ngakanu after Arastas

zones.name: Whakapanu Island
zones.route: Use this area to catch up on XP; find the entrance to Singing Caverns, usually at the far end of the island.
zones.notes: Optional: Crabshell cavern (alongside beach). Find Shark Pit to kill Great White One for Shark fin (across island on beach - move close to water). Find Petrified Pirate for torn map piece. Find exit to Singing Caverns (far end of island).

objectives.text: Find the Shark Pit to defeat the Great White One and loot the Shark fin
objectives.tip: Across island on beach - trigger by moving close to water at gaps in rock

objectives.text: Find the Petrified Pirate to get the torn map piece
objectives.tip: 1 of 4 torn map pieces - unlocks Plunder's Point

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Singing Caverns
objectives.tip: Approximately far end of island compared to starting point (UNCONFIRMED)

objectives.text: Find the Crabshell cavern and defeat the rare
objectives.tip: Alongside beach - level 4 uncut support gem

zones.name: Singing Caverns
zones.route: The boss is located on the opposite side of the 'square' from the entrance (circular or diamond shape layout).
zones.notes: Optional: Beckoning Clam (complete counter for humming pearl - turn in at Rog for rare amulet). Find Chamber of Echoes and kill Diamora. Go back to ship and select new location.

objectives.text: Find the Chamber of Echoes and kill Diamora, Song of Death, then speak to the Hooded One
objectives.reward: Weapon Piece, Shoreline Hideout (unlocks hideout after speaking to Ange)
objectives.tip: Final boss of Whakapanu Island - unlocks Shoreline Hideout

objectives.text: Go back to the Ship and select a new location
objectives.tip: Click UI element on top left of screen to get to ship

objectives.text: Find the Beckoning Clam and complete the counter to loot the Humming Pearl
objectives.reward: Rare Pearlescent Amulet (Quest turn-in to Rog)
objectives.tip: Turn in whenever back in town at Rog - rare amulet +8 all ele res

zones.name: Shrike Island
zones.route: Follow the long and winding road; the boss is located at the end.
zones.notes: Incredibly linear. Optional: Corpse nest for torn map piece. Find corrupted nests and kill Scourge of the Skies at end.

objectives.text: Find the corrupted nests and kill the Scourge of the Skies
objectives.tip: Linear path - boss at end

objectives.text: Go back to the Ship and select a new location
objectives.tip: Click UI element on top left of screen

objectives.text: Find the Corpse nest encounter and loot the torn map piece
objectives.tip: 2 of 4 torn map pieces

zones.name: Abandoned Prison
zones.route: Locate the entrance to Solitary Confinement.
zones.notes: Kill monsters until Chapel Key drops. Find and open Chapel Door, kill rare and minions (30% increased Mana or Life Recovery from flasks - can be changed later). Find exit to Solitary Confinement. TIP: Following ship side wall is best in 3/4 layouts. Always take first Prison Gate.

objectives.text: Kill monsters until the Chapel Key drops
objectives.reward: Permanent Buff (Choice: 30% increased Life or Mana Recovery from Flasks)
objectives.tip: Required for permanent buff

objectives.text: Find and open the Chapel Door, kill the rare and its minions
objectives.tip: 30% increased Mana or Life Recovery from flasks - can be changed later

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Solitary Confinement
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

zones.name: Solitary Confinement
zones.route: Hug the wall that the waves are crashing into.
zones.notes: Linear. Optional: Bronnach the Manhunter (guaranteed unique + rares). Find and kill The Prisoner. Go back to Ship.

objectives.text: Find and kill The Prisoner
objectives.tip: Hug wall that waves crash into

objectives.text: Go back to the Ship and select a new location
objectives.tip: Click UI element on top left

objectives.text: Find and kill Bronnach, the Manhunter
objectives.reward: Guaranteed unique item and some rares
objectives.tip: Guaranteed unique item and some rares (UNCONFIRMED)

zones.name: Isle of Kin
zones.route: Head in the opposite direction from the dock. Locate the entrance to Volcanic Warrens on the far end of the area along the furthest wall from the start.
zones.notes: Optional: Beast pen (free and kill Mimbok - lvl 12 skill gem + lvl 4 support gem). Find wrecked boat for torn map piece. Find Primal arena and kill Blind Beast (2 skill points). Find exit to Volcanic Warrens.

objectives.text: Find the wrecked boat and loot the torn map piece from the flayed sailor
objectives.tip: 3 of 4 torn map pieces

objectives.text: Find the Primal arena and kill The Blind Beast
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points)
objectives.tip: 2 skill points - head opposite from dock

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Volcanic Warrens
objectives.tip: Far end along furthest wall from start

objectives.text: Find the beast pen counter and free and kill Mimbok the Enslaved
objectives.tip: Lvl 12 uncut skill gem + lvl 4 uncut support gem (UNCONFIRMED)

objectives.text: Beast Pen (Mimbok the Enslaved)
objectives.reward: Uncut Skill Gem (Level 12) + Uncut Support Gem (Level 4)
objectives.tip: Find beast pen counter, free and kill Mimbok (UNCONFIRMED)

zones.name: Volcanic Warrens
zones.route: Long and winding area; boss spawn is on the opposite side of where you enter.
zones.notes: Long winding area. Find Tyrant's throne and kill Krutog. Speak with Matiki. Go back to Ship.

objectives.text: Find the Tyrant's throne and kill Krutog, Lord of Kin
objectives.tip: Opposite side from entrance

objectives.text: Speak with Matiki
objectives.tip: Quest progression

objectives.text: Go back to the Ship and select a new location
objectives.tip: Click UI element on top left

objectives.text: Volcanic Nest
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

zones.name: Kedge Bay
zones.route: Follow the path to the other side.
zones.notes: Fully optional zone. Find dead man's chest for torn map piece. Find exit to Journey's End.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Journey's End
objectives.tip: Very easy linear path

objectives.text: Find the dead man's chest and loot the torn map piece
objectives.tip: 4 of 4 torn map pieces - unlocks Plunder's Point

objectives.text: Smuggler's Stash
objectives.tip: 4 of 4 torn map pieces - unlocks Plunder's Point

zones.name: Journey's End
zones.route: Get to the opposite side, furthest from where you entered.
zones.notes: Summon and speak to Tujen. Optional: Rigged ship (timed loot). Find Captain's Chair, kill Captain Hartlin, loot Verisium. Go back to beginning, talk to Freya Hartlin. Go to town, speak with Dannig, take Verisium Spikes. Return to Journey's End, talk to Freya. Impale totems, finish Delirium by killing Omniphobia (2 skill points). Go back to Ship.

objectives.text: Summon and speak to Tujen
objectives.tip: Quest progression

objectives.text: Find the Captain's Chair, kill Captain Hartlin and loot the Verisium
objectives.tip: Required quest item

objectives.text: Go back to the beginning (via checkpoint) and talk to Freya Hartlin
objectives.tip: Quest progression

objectives.text: Go back to town, speak with Dannig and take the Verisium Spikes
objectives.tip: Required item

objectives.text: Return to Journey's End and talk to Freya Hartlin again
objectives.tip: Quest progression

objectives.text: Impale the totems and then finish the Delirium encounter by killing Omniphobia
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points) (NEW IN 0.4)
objectives.tip: 2 skill points reward - NEW IN 0.4

objectives.text: Go back to the Ship and select a new location
objectives.tip: Click UI element on top left

objectives.text: Find and loot the rigged ship
objectives.tip: Timer starts on first chest - any loot not picked up will disappear

zones.name: Arastas
zones.route: Exit town, hug the top wall (Coastal Ridge) to find the bells, then return to the central path to find the arena for Torvian.
zones.notes: Optional: Loot Evening and Morning Bell (3 regal, 3 exalted). Talk to and follow Missionary Lorandis into church, then out. Destroy forcefield, kill everyone. Continue to Excavated Pit, kill Torvian (extra currency). Enter Excavation.

objectives.text: Talk to and then follow Missionary Lorandis into the church, then go out again. Destroy the forcefield with any attack/spell and then kill everyone
objectives.tip: Quest progression

objectives.text: Continue until you find the Excavated Pit and kill Torvian, Hand of the Saviour
objectives.tip: Some extra currency

objectives.text: Enter the Excavation
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

objectives.text: Loot the Evening and Morning Bell
objectives.tip: Some extra currency - 3x regal, 3x exalted

objectives.text: Evening Bell
objectives.tip: Hug top wall (Coastal Ridge)

zones.name: Excavation
zones.route: Two large blocks connected by a small central square. Hug a wall until you find the boss/Precursor Forge area.
zones.notes: Optional: Excavated cache (lvl 4 support gem). Find Precursor Forge, defeat Benedictus. Witness lore events, talk to Hidden One, return to town via portal. Then talk to Hidden One again, talk to Rodri on ship to set sail to Ngakanu.

objectives.text: Find the Precursor Forge and defeat Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia
objectives.tip: Hug wall - two blocks connected by small square

objectives.text: Witness the lore events and then talk to the Hidden One, then return to town via portal
objectives.tip: Unlocks Precursor Forge

objectives.text: Find the Excavated cache
objectives.tip: Level 4 uncut support gem

zones.name: Eye of Hinekora
zones.route: Snake-like funnel. Complete three challenge rooms. One path leads to Silent Hall, the other to Halls of the Dead.
zones.notes: Snake-like funnel. Optional: rare chest behind waterfall when you get out of caves (lvl 12 skill gem UNCONFIRMED). Complete three 'test of mettle' encounters (linear). Find Silent Hall, press F to pay respects (talk to Navali - 5% increased max mana). Find exit to Hall of Dead.

objectives.text: Progress through the cavern and complete each 'test of mettle' encounter
objectives.tip: Very linear - impossible to miss anything except maybe next one

objectives.text: Find the Silent Hall and press F to pay your respects in the room behind it
objectives.tip: Talk to Navali for lore - 5% increased maximum mana

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Hall of the Dead
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

objectives.text: When you briefly get out of the caves again there is a rare chest behind a waterfall
objectives.tip: Level 12 uncut skill gem (UNCONFIRMED)

zones.name: Halls of the Dead
zones.route: Find the three Hinekora Totems (Tawhoa, Tasalio, Ngamahu) on the corners of an imaginary rectangle to gain permanent buffs before fighting Yama the White.
zones.notes: Find three tests (Tawhoa, Tasalio, Ngamahu), loot blank tattoos at end. Turn in at Totem in Arena, use Tattoo to gain bonus (cannot be changed later UNCONFIRMED). Find Yama's Test, defeat Yama, loot silver coin. Exit to Trial of Ancestors behind Yama encounter.

objectives.text: Find the three tests (Tawhoa, Tasalio, Ngamahu) and loot their blank tattoos at the end. Turn in at the Totem in the Arena and use the Tattoo afterwards to gain the bonus
objectives.reward: Choice of +5% Res or +5 Attribute (+5% Fire Res or +5 Str, +5% Cold Res or +5 Dex, +5% Lightning Res or +5 Int)
objectives.tip: 5 dex or 5% lightning res (Tawhoa), 5 int or 5% cold res, 5 str or 5% fire res (Ngamahu) - cannot be changed later (UNCONFIRMED)

objectives.text: Find Yama's Test, defeat Yama the White and loot the silver coin afterwards
objectives.reward: Access to Trial of the Ancestors
objectives.tip: Unlocks Trial of Ancestors

objectives.text: Exit to the Trial of the Ancestors behind the Yama encounter
objectives.tip: Continue to next zone

zones.name: Trial of the Ancestors
zones.route: Complete the Trial and speak to Hinekora (Navali).
zones.notes: Third way of acquiring ascendency points (not yet implemented). Talk to Navali to get Tattoo of Hinekora (2 passive skill points). Go back to Ship (currently bugged?).

objectives.text: Talk to Navali and get the Tattoo of Hinekora
objectives.reward: Book of Specialisation (+2 Weapon Set Skill Points)
objectives.tip: 2 passive skill points

objectives.text: Future third way of acquiring ascendency points
objectives.tip: Not yet implemented

objectives.text: Go back to the Ship and select a new location
objectives.tip: Click UI element on top left (currently bugged?)

zones.name: Ngakanu
zones.route: Find the boundary edge after leaving the large building and follow it to Heart of the Tribe.
zones.notes: Optional: Medicine Circle (kill monsters, talk to Kaimana - only lore). Find and enter Heart of the Tribe.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Heart of the Tribe
objectives.tip: Find boundary edge after leaving large building, follow to Heart of Tribe

objectives.text: Find the Medicine Circle, kill the monsters and talk to Kaimana
objectives.tip: Only some lore

objectives.text: Abyss
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

zones.name: Heart of the Tribe
zones.route: Continually head Northerly; the final boss is in the direction opposite the nearest Checkpoint.
zones.notes: Final boss of Act 4. Find Sacred Interior and defeat Tavakai. Go back to town, speak with Hooded One. Completes Act 4, onwards with interludes.

objectives.text: Find the Sacred Interior and defeat Tavakai
objectives.tip: Head Northerly - opposite direction from checkpoint

objectives.text: Go back to the Town and speak with the Hooded One
objectives.tip: End of Act 4 - onwards with interludes

objectives.text: Meeting House
objectives.tip: Optional treasure

objectives.text: Isolde and Heldra
Godwin and Sigbert
Kill Oswin, the Dread Warden
objectives.reward: Unique item, Vaal Orb, +2 Passive Skill Points

objectives.text: Kill Thane Wulfric and Lady Elswyth
Warden's Ledger
Kill Akthi and Anundr
Kill Elzarah, the Cobra Lord
Kill Azmadi, the Faridun Prince
Orbala's Pillar (choose one of 7 Boons, swappable)
Kill Lythara, the Wayward Spear
Kill The Abominable Yeti
Kill Rakkar, the Frozen Talon
Kill Stormgore, the Guardian
Kill Zolin and Zelina
objectives.reward: +40 Spirit, Free Unique Item, +2 Passive Skill Points (Book of Specialisation)
